universal.label: Universal Constraints
universal.description: Limited default guardrails that apply to every schedule. Studio, trainer, and class-specific rules must be created and saved from Settings.

trainer_specific.label: Trainer Specific Constraints
trainer_specific.description: Trainer-specific availability, caps, and owned blocks.

UNIV-002.description: All 3 time bands must have >= 2 class every weekday
UNIV-002.title: UNIV-002

UNIV-004.description: Sunday max 5-6 classes, no class before 9:00
UNIV-004.title: UNIV-004

UNIV-009.description: No trainer > 4 consecutive classes without 5 min gap
UNIV-009.title: UNIV-009

UNIV-010.description: No trainer > 4 classes in one day
UNIV-010.title: UNIV-010

UNIV-014.description: Peak midday slot must never be empty
UNIV-014.title: UNIV-014

UNIV-022.description: A trainer cannot be scheduled across 2 locations in the same shift
UNIV-022.title: UNIV-022

UNIV-023.description: Same class formats must not be scheduled consecutively
UNIV-023.title: UNIV-023

UNIV-024.description: No classes before 07:00, between 13:00-15:00, or after 20:30
UNIV-024.title: UNIV-024

UNIV-025.description: Every trainer must get at least 1 full day off each week; 2 is preferred
UNIV-025.title: UNIV-025
